idea-plugin.name: CLI Agent Dock
idea-plugin.description:
CLI Agent Dock brings your favorite coding agent right into your JetBrains IDE — no more alt-tabbing to a terminal window. It adds a dedicated tool window to the right side bar (next to Database, Gradle, and friends) with an embedded terminal that automatically launches a coding agent CLI in your project.

By default it opens with Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot CLI is supported too. Pick an agent from the dropdown and open as many sessions as you like — each runs in its own closeable tab, so you can drive several agents at once. Your preferred agent is remembered across projects and restarts. Support for more agents (OpenAI Codex CLI, OpenCode, and more) is on the roadmap.

  • Embedded terminal, pre-launched with your agent CLI in your project directory
  • Multiple independent, closeable agent sessions per project
  • Live "files changed" panel — see what the agent touched as it works, with one-click diffs for each file and a jump to the commit view
  • Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, and Linux
